sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43746" key="eu)e/kruptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐέκ-ρυπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43746.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to wash out</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
